headline: Tesla Optimus first agent baseline. Developing-band placement reinforced by compound disclosure-gap and pace-aggression evidence: (1) 1,000+ Optimus Gen 3 units reportedly deployed across Tesla factories (Gigafactory Texas, Fremont) per January 2026 reporting — but January 2026 earnings call confirmed zero Optimus units doing useful factory work at that point; disclosure-gap concern flagged by robotics academics; (2) Tesla 10-million-units/year Giga Texas Optimus factory groundbreaking; (3) labor groups raising displacement concerns for Tesla manufacturing workers; (4) Tesla NOT a 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory; (5) Musk's concurrent governance (DOGE/Trump administration role through 2025; xAI; SpaceX) creates conflict-of-interest amplifier on AI/robotics-deployment accountability. Published 31.2 / Developing band sustained. Sub-threshold ACC drift (-0.5 considered for disclosure gap) and INT drift (-0.5 considered for Musk multi-entity governance) but published score already reflects critical-band-proximate placement. Recommend confirm at 31.2 with first-baseline rationale.
key_evidence: January 2026 reporting: 1,000+ Optimus Gen 3 humanoid units deployed across Tesla factories (Gigafactory Texas, Fremont).

January 2026 Tesla earnings call: confirmed zero Optimus units doing useful factory work — disclosure-gap concern flagged by robotics academics (gap between demonstration claims and operational deployment).
Tesla 10-million-units/year Giga Texas Optimus factory groundbreaking; targeting 1M units/year by late 2026.
Labor groups (UAW commentary, manufacturing-union analysis) raising displacement concerns for Tesla manufacturing workers as Optimus scales.
Tesla is NOT a 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory (negative distinguisher vs Boston Dynamics, Agility).
Musk concurrent governance: Tesla CEO + xAI CEO + SpaceX CEO + DOGE/Trump administration role through 2025 — multi-entity conflict-of-interest amplifier on AI/robotics-deployment accountability.
No published Optimus model card, system card, or safety policy specific to humanoid-deployment context.

evidence.source: Saving Advice — Tesla plans to deploy Optimus in factories, labor groups concerned
evidence.finding: Labor groups raising displacement concerns; Tesla deployment-pace pattern.

evidence.source: OHSE.ca — Tesla Gen 3 Optimus safety and ethics
CDO Times — Safety and ethics of Tesla's robot revolution
evidence.finding: Disclosure-gap analysis; demonstration-vs-deployment claims credibility concern.

evidence.source: Programming Helper Tech — Tesla Optimus Gen 3 production deployment 2026
evidence.finding: 1,000+ Optimus Gen 3 units reportedly deployed across Tesla factories.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 2.5 confirmed. A1 detection: Tesla operational reporting subject to disclosure-gap concerns; A4 amplification: demonstration-claim pattern outpaces operational-deployment-fact pattern.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 2.5 confirmed. E1 affective resonance: Optimus marketing posture acknowledges 'help with chores' framing but no documented empathic-regard architecture for displaced-worker stakeholders.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 2.5 confirmed. AC2 proportionality: factory-deployment scale (1,000+ units claimed) without published independent-safety-validation framework; AC4 response: incident-response framework not publicly documented.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 2.0 confirmed. EQ2 distributional awareness: labor-displacement concerns documented by labor groups; no published equity-impact analysis from Tesla.
scoring_rationale.BND: 2.0 confirmed. B3 scope clarity: NOT an anti-weaponization pledge signatory (negative); no published scope restriction; B5 consent: worker-consent framework not publicly documented for in-factory deployment.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 2.0 confirmed. AB2 transparency: disclosure-gap pattern (demonstration vs operational deployment); no published model card, system card, safety policy. AB4 reparation undefined.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 2.5 confirmed. S1 causal reasoning: 10M/year scale + Musk multi-entity governance amplifies systemic-harm pathways; ASTM standards-working-group participation status not documented.
scoring_rationale.INT: 2.0 confirmed. I1 consistency: declared safety commitments contradicted by demonstration-vs-deployment disclosure gap; I2 non-performance: pattern of aggressive timeline announcements followed by quiet downward revision.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction confirms 31.2. Developing band sustained. Confirm with first-baseline rationale; sub-threshold downward drift considered (ACC -0.5, INT -0.5) but does not yield material change.

negativeSignals: Disclosure-gap pattern (1,000+ units claimed vs January 2026 earnings 'zero useful factory work'); not an anti-weaponization pledge signatory; labor-displacement concerns from manufacturing-union groups; Musk multi-entity governance conflict (Tesla + xAI + SpaceX + DOGE); no published Optimus model card, system card, or safety policy; aggressive 10M/year scale ambition outpaces regulatory framework.
positiveSignals: Internal Tesla manufacturing context provides controlled-environment deployment scaffolding; Tesla industrial-safety baseline applies; Optimus Gen 3 design iteration suggests safety-feature development; manufacturing-employment ecosystem provides job-mobility framework for displaced workers; Tesla scale provides resource base for potential remediation.
sector_context: Robotics Labs / commercial-humanoid + Musk-governance cluster. Cross-reference: Boston Dynamics (anti-weaponization pledge, structured Hyundai deployment), Agility (anti-weaponization pledge, structured Toyota pilot), Figure AI (no pledge, BMW pilot — sub-threshold negative), 1X Technologies (consumer pre-orders), SpaceX AI (Musk-governance overlap). Tesla Optimus distinguished by largest-scale ambition + disclosure-gap pattern + Musk multi-entity conflict.
open_actions_resolved: First baseline established with developing-band confirmation
Disclosure-gap pattern (1,000+ vs zero useful work) registered
open_actions_carried: Watch: any Optimus deployment harm or worker-injury report
Watch: Tesla earnings-call disclosure of operational Optimus deployment numbers
Watch: any anti-weaponization pledge signing event
Watch: Musk DOGE conclusion and conflict-of-interest litigation outcomes
Watch: any Optimus model card, system card, or safety policy publication
